cookieConsent.title: Cookies & Privacy
cookieConsent.body: We use necessary cookies to run the site. With your consent, we can also enable analytics to understand how the site is used and improve the experience.

necessary.label: Necessary
necessary.desc: Required for core functionality — language, security, and remembering your cookie preferences.

analytics.label: Analytics
analytics.desc: Anonymous usage metrics (page views, dwell time) to help us improve the site. No identification used.

marketing.label: Marketing
marketing.desc: Third-party cookies for campaign measurement and remarketing. Currently inactive.

cookieConsent.managePrompt: You can change your preferences at any time.

privacy.metaDescription: How we collect, use, and protect your personal data at production.gr.

sections.p: Production LTD, 63 Tsamali St., Acharnes 13671, Greece. Email: info@production.gr · Phone: +30 210 232 27 50.

We only collect what you submit through our briefing form (name, company, email, phone, project description) and technical browsing data (IP, browser, pages visited) if you have consented to analytics.
Communication about your briefing, preparing a proposal, and improving the site. We do not sell data to third parties.
Consent (briefing form, analytics cookies) and legitimate interest for the secure operation of the site.
Briefing data: up to 24 months after the last interaction. Analytics: per provider settings (typically 14 months).
You have the right of access, rectification, erasure, restriction, portability, and objection. Send requests to info@production.gr; we reply within 30 days.
See the dedicated Cookies page for details.
You may file a complaint with the Greek Data Protection Authority (www.dpa.gr).

cookies.metaDescription: Which cookies production.gr uses and how you can manage them.
cookies.intro: Cookies are small files stored on your device. We use them for core functionality and — with your consent — for usage analytics.

rows.desc: Store your cookie preferences and chosen language.
Anonymous measurement of visits and behaviour. Active only with your consent.
We do not currently use marketing cookies.

cookies.manageText: You can change your choices any time from the button below, or clear all cookies from your browser settings.

home.metaDescription: Crafting Retail Conversion. POP/POS systems that turn the shelf into a choice — from an Industrialized Craft facility in Acharnes, Greece.

hero.lede: Solutions that win the shopper's eye in the first 3 seconds.

aboutStrip.p1Pre: Production LTD was founded in 2008, rooted in the craft of silk-screen printing. Today we are a
aboutStrip.p1Post: for end-to-end POP systems — under the strategic stewardship of the Dimaras family.
aboutStrip.p2Pre: We design and build display systems that turn raw materials into brand experience. We believe in
aboutStrip.p2Post: — the coexistence of our historical identity (Silk) with state-of-the-art technologies such as digital printing and CNC.

services.meta: Special Projects · Floor & Counter Stands · Display Systems · Gondola · Pallet · Wall Units · Shelf Trays · POS Accessories

featBig.title: Special Projects
featBig.desc: Bespoke solutions combining materials (Metal+Wood, Plexi+MDF, Mix 3+) — for flagship campaigns and Key Accounts. "Tell us what you want; we'll tell you which material and why."

items.title: Floor Stands
items.desc: Floor units — Cardboard, Metal, Wood, Plastic, Plexiglass.

items.title: Counter Stands
items.desc: Counter-top units — premium finish or mass-production volume.

items.title: Gondola & Shelving
items.desc: Gondola ends, shelving systems — metal, wood, mix.

items.title: Pallet & Half-Pallet
items.desc: Large-format — cardboard, metal, mix for seasonal pushes.

items.title: POS Accessories
items.desc: Wobblers, clip strips, hanging displays, table tents, packaging.

items.title: Value Engineering
items.p: Lower production cost and waste through smart design from minute one — protecting your margin.

items.title: Rapid Response
items.p: From concept to physical prototype in half the time. Vertically integrated — the whole team under one roof.

items.title: Zero-Risk Reliability
items.p: OTIF — On Time In Full. We commit to zero surprises on time, cost or quality.

items.title: B2B2C Expertise
items.p: "Silent salespeople" — conversion tools that win the shopper's eye in the first 3 seconds.

items.title: Eco-Innovation
items.p: 40–50% of output in recyclable materials (PS, paper, PET, plexiglass). Flat-pack on cardboard builds.

work.h2: Conversion tools that became launches — not signage in a market.

process.h2: Four stages. One team. Zero surprises.

steps.title: Strategic Analysis & Engineering
steps.p: Brief analysis, selection of the ideal materials for maximum durability at the lowest cost.

steps.title: Rapid Prototyping
steps.p: 3D mockup in the retail context and a physical sample in record time — to test ergonomics and "Wow Factor."

steps.title: Industrialized Production
steps.p: CNC + digital printing at millimetre precision, alongside silk-screen and hand assembly.

steps.title: Logistics & OTIF Delivery
steps.p: Quality control before packing and delivery strictly on the agreed date, across Greece.

sustain.p: 40–50% of output in recyclable materials. Nesting 92% dramatically reduces waste and carbon footprint. Flat-pack solutions exclusively on cardboard builds to minimise transport.

pillars.p: PS, paper, PET, plexiglass — 40–50% of output.
Smart sheet layout — dramatic waste reduction.
Cardboard builds — reduced transport carbon footprint.

about.metaDescription: Production LTD — Industrialized Craft in Acharnes, Greece since 2008. A vertically integrated POP/POS manufacturer under the strategic stewardship of the Dimaras family.

hero.lede1: Production LTD is a vertically integrated facility for industrial excellence, manufacturing and POP Materials solutions in Acharnes, Attica.
hero.lede2: From the craft of silk-screen printing in 2008, to a model factory designing conversion tools for Europe's leading brands.

story.p1Pre: Print Silk Production was founded in 2008, rooted in the craft of
story.p1Post: . Today, the company has evolved into a model, vertically integrated facility for industrial excellence, manufacturing and POP Materials solutions, while keeping the personal commitment of the Dimaras family.
story.p2Post: (Operations & Production), the business combines decades of experience with the drive of a new generation.
story.p3Pre: We don't stop at ink on board. We design and build end-to-end display systems that turn raw materials into brand experience. We believe in
story.p3Post: : the coexistence of our historical identity (Silk) with state-of-the-art technologies such as digital printing and CNC.
story.pull: "Every solution of ours is a Conversion Tool, engineered to dominate the shopper's attention."
story.p4Post: . At our Acharnes facility, production is monitored at every stage, ensuring the fastest market response and project execution strictly on the agreed date. We offer our partners the safety and innovation that today's environmentally responsible retail context demands.

sigs.name: Vangelis Dimaras
sigs.desc: Vertically integrated production, Value Engineering, OTIF.

cards.label: 01 · Mission
cards.p: Through solutions that grow the value of brands at the point of sale.

cards.label: 02 · Vision
cards.p: For turning manufacturing complexity into innovative display systems.

cards.label: 03 · Promise
cards.p: We commit to zero surprises on time, cost or quality.

values.h2: Four values — visible across the entire site.

items.p: Lower production cost and waste (Nesting 92%) through smart design. We protect the client's margin.
Absolute delivery consistency (OTIF). The brand is launch-ready, no exceptions.
The rare coexistence of decades of human experience with industrial millimetre precision.
40–50% recyclable. Flat-pack on cardboard builds. Nesting 92% for reduced carbon footprint.

milestones.h2: 17 years — from silk-screen to a vertically integrated facility.

items.p: Print Silk Production — we start with silk-screen. Dimaras family, Acharnes.
Expansion into vacuum-formed POP — first volume runs for FMCG clients.
3D design + CNC + digital printing — all in Acharnes.
40–50% recyclable materials · Nesting 92% pipeline for waste reduction.
New positioning: "Crafting Retail Conversion" — Special Projects flagship.

items.label: 01 · Primary persona
items.name: Katerina
items.role: Launch / Trade Marketing Manager · FMCG, Cosmetics, Retail
items.painP: Fears delays that will derail the launch. Manages multiple suppliers. Anxious when a crisis hits.
items.goalP: OTIF guarantee and "Wow Factor" on premium materials. A partner who handles everything.

items.label: 02 · Secondary persona
items.name: Markos
items.painP: Pressure to cut cost + ESG targets. Must justify supplier choices to leadership.
items.goalP: Measurable data (Nesting 92%, recyclable %) and Eco-Innovation solutions that stand up to ESG audits.

clientsWall.h2: Brands that trust us for OTIF launches.

items.quote: We choose Production LTD because they turn a demanding brief into an economically viable solution, without sacrificing our brand aesthetic.
In a world where launches don't slip, the certainty that materials will be on the shelf the day we agreed is why we trust them.

services.metaDescription: 9 build types of POP/POS: Special Projects, Floor & Counter Stands, Display Systems, Gondola, Pallet, Wall Units, Shelf Trays and POS Accessories — in paper, metal, wood, plexi and mix.

hero.p1: From bespoke Special Projects with 3+ materials, to POS accessories in thousands of units. The whole taxonomy follows the client's logic:
hero.p1Strong: what you need → in which material → for which channel

specialFeat.p: Bespoke solutions combining 3+ materials — for Key Accounts, flagship campaigns and installations that must function as conversion tools from day one.

products.h2: The 8 standard categories — and all their materials.

items.title: Floor Stands
items.desc: Aisle-end & freestanding units. Paper, Metal, Wood, Plastic, Plexiglass — from flat-pack seasonal to permanent industrial builds.

items.title: Counter Stands
items.desc: Compact displays at tills, windows, vitrines. Premium MDF & Plexi for cosmetics/pharmacy or mass-production volume for SM impulse.

items.title: Display Systems
items.desc: End-to-end modular systems — expandable, repeatable across store rollouts with consistent brand presence.

items.title: Gondola & Shelving
items.desc: Shelving systems and gondola ends — industrial durability for supermarkets, premium finish for cosmetics & pharmacy.

items.title: Pallet & Half-Pallet
items.desc: Drop-and-shop units on Euro pallets — ideal for seasonal pushes and hypermarket campaigns with high visibility.

items.title: Wall Units
items.desc: Wall systems — premium MDF for pharmacy/beauty, or industrial metal for heavy-use environments.

items.title: Shelf Trays & Vacuum
items.desc: Vacuum-formed trays in PS and PETG. Lightweight & volume-friendly — ideal for supermarket shelf-organization.

items.title: POS Accessories
items.desc: Rulers, wobblers, danglers, clip strips, hanging displays, table tents, custom packaging. All the add-ons that complete the ecosystem.

matrix.pPre: Not every material fits every product. This grid shows the combinations we do best. For combinations not shown here, see

cap.h2: Industrialized Craft — all production in Acharnes.
cap.p: We are a vertically integrated facility: 3D design, digital printing, silk-screen (Silk legacy), CNC, vacuum forming, assembly and logistics — all under one roof.

items.p: CAD modeling, photoreal renders, production files.
Where we started — kept for premium finishing & special applications.
UV flatbed & latex — rigid & flexible substrates.
Router, laser, plasma · vacuum forming for volume.
Smart sheet layout — dramatic waste reduction.
Hand assembly & per-unit quality control.

floorStands.metaDescription: Freestanding floor units in paper, metal, wood, plastic and plexiglass — value-engineered POP displays for super markets, pharmacies, HORECA and retail.

hero.lede: Freestanding floor units — from flat-pack seasonal pallet displays to permanent industrial builds with LED integration. 5 available materials, the same Value Engineering and OTIF discipline on every build.

heroPhoto.phTag: Photo · Coca-Cola summer end-cap, AB Vasilopoulos

materials.metaLine2: Value Engineering by volume, durability, budget.

items.p: Flat-pack, economical, 100% recyclable. Ideal for seasonal promotions and short campaigns. Quick deployment.
Maximum durability, permanent large-scale builds. Industrial aesthetic for heavy-use environments.

items.phTag: Photo · Wood / MDF premium floor unit
items.p: Premium finish, CNC precision, paint. Warm & premium aesthetic — ideal for cosmetics, fashion, hospitality.
Flexibility, light weight, true colour rendition. Good price at volume run, ideal for mid-life campaigns.

plexi.phTag: Photo · Plexiglass premium floor display, laser-cut, LED-edge
plexi.phCaption: the Wow Factor — laser cut, LED edge, premium translucency
plexi.p: Transparency, laser cut, light diffusion — the sacred material for the "Wow Factor." Premium retail, cosmetics flagship, and Special Projects.

twoCol.phTag: Photo · CNC + silk-screen, production in Acharnes
twoCol.p: Every floor stand that leaves Acharnes is engineered to win the shopper's eye in the first 3 seconds. That's the difference between a "build" and a conversion tool.

checklist.p: Material chosen on cost/quality, not on cutting quality.
Smart sheet layout — dramatic waste & carbon footprint reduction.
The stand on the shelf on launch day — zero surprises.
Logistics & installation by us, across Greece.

portfolio.metaDescription: Selected POP/POS work by Production LTD — from the Coca-Cola summer end-cap across 240 stores to Johnnie Walker House and Vichy pharmacy walls.

hero.lede: Selected work — POP/POS, special projects, gondola, pallet, wall units. Filter by type, material or channel. All delivered OTIF.

cocaCola.metaDescription: Case study: floor stand and summer end-cap for Coca-Cola — deployed across 240 stores in the Greek market, with measurable conversion uplift.

hero.lede: Vacuum-formed POS unit with integrated LED edge lighting — from concept to delivery in six weeks, entirely in-house.

bigvisual.phTag: Photo · Hero installation, AB Vasilopoulos Athens

narrative.h2: An end-cap that stands on its own.
narrative.p1Post: for the summer campaign — tall enough to be seen from the end of the aisle, sturdy enough to take customer handling, and light enough to ship to 240 stores in two weeks.
narrative.p2: The brief arrived in early July, with campaign launch on the first Saturday of August — six weeks from brief to installation. We designed in 3D, prototyped within 5 days, and shipped with LED edge lighting integrated into the top shelf to cut through supermarket lighting.

specs.h2: Vacuum-formed body, LED edge, drop-and-shop logistics.
specs.p: We chose vacuum forming for the main body — it lowers cost across 240 units without compromising quality. The LED strip is battery-powered and fits on-site in 30 seconds.

steps.p: Discovery call, CAD design, 3 renders for approval.
Vacuum-form test, structural validation, packaging mock-up.
Physical sample presentation at Coca-Cola HQ. Final tweaks.
240 units, 5 working days, full QA pass.

pullquote.qPre: Production took our brief and gave it back as a finished thing six weeks later. Every store had its unit

results.p: The campaign ran from August to September 2024 across 240 AB Vasilopoulos and Sklavenitis sites. Every unit was installed before campaign kick-off.

contact.metaDescription: Get in touch with Production LTD — info@production.gr, +30 210 232 27 50, 63 Tsamali St., Acharnes 13671. Strategic briefing and pricing within 48 hours.

hero.h1Em: The engineering team will take it from here.
hero.lede: Email, phone, or use the Strategic Briefing Form for a structured analysis. We usually respond within 24 hours — the Engineering team begins Value Engineering analysis from the first message.

email.meta: General enquiries, briefs, partnership requests. Reply within 24 hours (Mon–Fri).

phone.meta: Reception · Monday to Friday, 09:00–19:00. For urgent productions, ask for the production manager.

address.meta: Vertically integrated facility — silk-screen, CNC, digital printing, vacuum forming, assembly. Client visits by appointment.

hours.meta: Office 09:00–19:00 · closed weekends. For urgent productions, ask for the Operations team.

form.subPre: For more complex briefs, use the
form.name: Name
form.messagePh: Tell us a bit about the brief, quantities and timeline…
form.successAlert: Thank you! We'll be in touch shortly.

quote.metaDescription: Strategic briefing for your next POP/POS project — a 5-step wizard that turns the brief into a quote. Channel, goals, materials, timeline and files.
quote.ledePre: Fill in your details and the Engineering team will reach out for an initial
quote.ledePost: . 5 steps, ~4 minutes — Value Engineering starts from the first message.

goals.title: New product launch
goals.desc: Maximum shelf visibility on launch day — OTIF critical.

goals.title: Seasonal promotion
goals.desc: Limited-life campaign — flat-pack & paper usually ideal.

goals.title: Permanent presence
goals.desc: Long-life retail — premium materials (metal, MDF, plexi).

step1.p: Name, company, role, contact. All data is kept encrypted and used only for this brief.
step1.name: Name *

step2.pPost: analysis — they tell us where the stand will live and what life-cycle your campaign has.

step3.h2: Do you have a material preference?
step3.p: Pick if you know — multiple selections are fine. If not, the Engineering team will propose via Value Engineering after the briefing.
step3.sustainabilityPh: e.g. preference for 100% recyclable, avoid PVC, ESG certificates required for Procurement audit…

step4.h2: When do you want the stand on the shelf?
step4.pPost: promise — On Time In Full. From here, our team works backwards.

step5.h2: Get data flowing for strategic analysis.
step5.p: Upload whatever you have: brand guidelines, references, existing drawings, market research. The more data, the more accurate the initial Value Engineering analysis.
step5.formats: PDF · AI · PSD · JPG · PNG · DWG · ZIP · up to 50MB per file
step5.notesPh: Tell us which is the main brief and which are just references. Is there something critical the Engineering team should know first?
step5.consentPost: and allow Production LTD to contact me about this strategic briefing.

quote.submitAlert: Thank you! Your brief has been sent.

summary.otifHint: Initial lead-time analysis. Final quote after the Engineering team reviews the brief.
summary.marker: "peace of mind — from the very first message"

sitemap.metaDescription: Site map of production.gr — quick access to every page (Home, Products, Work, Company, Contact, Strategic Briefing).

top.ledePre: Hi-fi static mocks for the new production.gr — version 2, aligned with brief v2.2.
top.ledePost: tagline, new taxonomy (9 product types · 6 materials · 7 channels), 5 Strategic Reasons, 4-stage process, Industrialized Craft positioning, Dimaras family, Acharnes.

cards.desc: Crafting Retail Conversion hero, channels strip, Industrialized Craft excerpt, 9-type product grid, 5 strategic reasons, 4-stage process, materials, OTIF stats, eco-innovation.
Special Projects flagship + 8 standard categories + Material × Product matrix + Capabilities.
Drill-down across 5 materials (Paper, Metal, Wood, Plastic, Plexi) + channel suitability fit ratings per channel.
Sticky filter chips, 3-tile featured row, uniform 12-card grid, pagination.
Hero, brief narrative, specs table, gallery, 6-week timeline, pull quote, results, next.
Verbatim approved story, Dimaras family signature (3 generations), Mission/Vision/Promise, 4 values, Sage+Creator archetype, personas (Katerina/Markos), milestones, clients, testimonials.
4 info cards (email/phone/Acharnes/hours), quick form, abstract map with pin in Acharnes. Yiannis/Vangelis direct emails.

Identity → Channel & Goal → Materials → OTIF Timing (date picker with lead-time check) → Upload Brief. Live OTIF analysis sidebar. Brief fields as requested: Channel · Material · Goal · Date · Upload Brief.

items.p: Confirmed orange from the brief. All tokens, gradients & shadows updated.
Across the site — from hero, to footer, to meta tags. "The Retail Stand Company" was removed.
Yiannis (Sales/Marketing), Vangelis (Operations/Production), Konstantinos (Operations). Map & address updated to Acharnes.
9 product types (Special Projects flagship) · 6 materials · 7 retail channels — with Material × Product matrix for cross-filtering.
Value Engineering, Rapid Response, Zero-Risk OTIF, B2B2C, Eco-Innovation. Process: Strategic Analysis → Rapid Prototyping → Industrialized Production → OTIF Delivery.
5-step wizard aligned with the brief: Identity → Channel & Goal → Materials → OTIF Timing (date picker) → Upload Brief.
The approved 'About Us' copy is used verbatim in About. Sage + Creator archetype, Mission/Vision/Promise, personas Katerina & Markos.
The brief asks for two aesthetic directions to be evaluated. Current version = Direction A (Energetic/Industrial). Direction B (Minimal/Editorial à la Apple/Diageo) — next iteration.
